title: equisetum hyemale var. elongatum
intro: Equisetum hyemale var. elongatum, also known as the scouring rush, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is a variant of the Equisetum hyemale species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale var. elongatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it should be noted that its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
